description: GOB Bangladesh moon-sighting corrections vs Umm al-Qura (Saudi Arabia). offset=-1 means BD is 1 day behind UQ. offset=-2 means 2 days behind. Update each year after GOB gazette. Bump 'version' on every edit.

offsets.note: 1447/8 through 1448/3: BD moon sighting 1 day later than UQ.
1448/4 (Rabi al-Thani): UQ starts Sep 12, GOB starts Sep 14 — 2 day gap.
1448/5 (Jumada al-Ula) through end of 1448: back to 1 day gap.
